title: The Accidental Prime Minister
subTitle: Amidst the political upheaval, Dr Manmohan Singh, an Indian economist, faces several challenges during his tenure as the Prime Minister of India.

title: Welcome to New York
subTitle: A recovery agent and a designer become part of a big Bollywood event in New York, where chaos ensues, changing their lives forever.

title: Buddha in a Traffic Jam
subTitle: A management student's social media success unexpectedly pulls him into a dangerous clash of idealogies, where trust breaks down and agendas collide within academic walls.

title: Kites
subTitle: Jay, a dance instructor, falls in love with Tony's fiancee. They make their daring escape and get married, but Tony is determined to track them down.

title: Footfairy
subTitle: A CBI officer investigates a string of gruesome murders committed by a serial killer with a foot fetish. However, things take an ugly turn when he gets close to catching the killer.

title: Badhaai Do
subTitle: After being pestered to get married, a closeted gay cop decides to enter a marriage of convenience with a lesbian woman to appease his family.

title: Firaaq
subTitle: In the aftermath of Gujarat's violent 2002 riots, victims find their lives changed forever and reel from the deep impact the upheaval left on them.

title: Bareilly Ki Barfi
subTitle: In the small-town of Bareilly, a free-spirited Bitti hates that she is being pressured into getting married. But when she reads a book that reflects her life, she sets out to find its author.

title: Gaami
subTitle: Shankar, a reclusive man, embarks on an adventure to the Himalayas to find a cure for a rare human condition. However, things get complicated when his past unfolds.

title: Toofaan
subTitle: Aziz Ali, an orphan who works for a thug, meets Ananya, who encourages him to pursue his passion for boxing. However, one wrong decision costs him his career.

title: Darlings
subTitle: Badru desperately wishes her abusive husband mends his ill-treatment of her. However, when her situation worsens, Badru takes matters into her own hands.

title: The Tashkent Files
subTitle: Following the mysterious death of India's second prime minister, Lal Bahadur Shastri, a team launches a probe into the conspiracy of it being an assassination.

title: The Tashkent Files
subTitle: Following the mysterious death of India's second prime minister, Lal Bahadur Shastri, a team launches a probe into the conspiracy of it being an assassination.

title: The Last Color
subTitle: Choti, a young tightrope walker, wishes to pursue her education but struggles to make a living. She soon befriends Noor, a widow who yearns to play Holi but is forced to live a life of abstinence.

title: Saheb, Biwi Aur Gangster 3
subTitle: Madhvi Devi relishes her political power but worries about losing it upon her husband Aditya's release from prison. To prevent this, she recruits Uday, a gangster, to assassinate him.

title: Daas Dev
subTitle: Dev is the heir to the throne who is challenged by his beloved Paro in his political backyard. Chandni loves Dev, although she knows that her love is unrequited.

title: Sonchiriya
subTitle: After their leader's death, a group of dacoits splits up and runs away. On the way, they meet two women and help them escape their family and reach the hospital.

title: Vicky Donor
subTitle: Vicky, a lively young man, works as a sperm donor for Dr Baldev Chaddha and proves to be highly successful. Consequently, Baldev's clinic thrives with the help of Vicky's contributions.

title: Half Girlfriend
subTitle: After meeting in college, Madhav is smitten with Riya and falls in love with her. However, after his repeated attempts to win her over, she eventually agrees to become his half girlfriend.

title: Raanjhanaa
subTitle: A carefree youngster sacrifices his love after his childhood sweetheart plans to marry a man from her own community. Nevertheless, fate convinces him to pursue his lady love at any cost.

title: Badla
subTitle: Naina, a successful entrepreneur, gets caught in a web of accusations when her lover is found dead. Later, she hires a reputable lawyer to work with her on the case.

title: Middle Class Love
subTitle: A young college boy who is disappointed with his family's middle-class lifestyle decides to escape it by joining a popular college and having a wealthy girlfriend.

title: Kedarnath
subTitle: After a Muslim porter falls in love with the rebellious daughter of a Hindu priest, their love is tested due to misunderstandings and a natural disaster.

title: Agent Vinod
subTitle: On a mission to decipher a colleague's dying message, RAW agent Vinod travels across different countries and uncovers a dangerous conspiracy against India.

title: Agent Vinod
subTitle: On a mission to decipher a colleague's dying message, RAW agent Vinod travels across different countries and uncovers a dangerous conspiracy against India.

title: Sherdil: The Pilibhit Saga
subTitle: A sacrificed village leader, Gangaram, embarks on a journey in search of a dangerous tiger that threatens people.

title: Qarib Qarib Singlle
subTitle: Jaya and Yogi, two contrasting personalities, set out to retrace past relationships, sparking the most eventful trip of their lives.

title: CityLights
subTitle: Deepak Singh, an ex-army person from Rajasthan, moves to Mumbai with his family hoping for a better lifestyle. However, upon arrival, he realises that everything is not as easy as it seems.

title: Movie
subTitle: Bringing the best in television.
